title: Guidance Document - Medical device licence renewal and fees for the right to sell licensed medical devices - Canada.ca
content:
## Guidance Document - Medical device licence renewal and fees for the right to sell licensed medical devices

## Related guides and help
- Performance Standards for Fees in Respect of Drugs and Medical Device Order
- Canada's Access to Medicines Regime: Application Process for Drugs for Export to Developing and Least Developed Countries
- Directive on Public Money and Receivables
- Health Canada's Food and Drugs Act Liaison Office

## Related acts and regulations
- Food and Drugs Regulations
- Transitional Fee Regulations
This guidance document provides information to industry and health care professionals on the regulatory requirements for fees for the right to sell medical devices.

## Who this guide is for
All manufacturers submitting a medical device for licence renewal.
- 1. Introduction 1.1 Objective 1.2 Policy statements 1.3 Scope and application
- 1.2 Policy statements
- 1.3 Scope and application
- 2. Guidance 2.1 Annual licence renewal procedure 2.1.1 Annual renewal package 2.1.2 Return of the renewal form 2.1.3 Processing the renewal form and invoicing 2.1.4 Failure to renew 2.2 Invoicing and fee payment 2.3 Mitigation measures 2.3.1 Small business 2.3.2 Publicly funded health care institutions 2.3.3 Government organizations 2.4 Missed performance standards 2.5 Applicable fees 2.6 General contact information
